Uses of Package
com.nib.commons.io.catalog

Packages that use com.nib.commons.io.catalog
Package
Description
com.nib.commons.io.cache
Provides caching mechanisms for I/O operations.
com.nib.commons.io.catalog
Provides catalog management mechanisms for I/O operations.
com.nib.commons.io.tools
Provides command-line tools and utilities for file system operations.
com.nib.commons.io.vsam
Provides classes and interfaces for emulating VSAM (Virtual Storage Access Method) file organizations.
com.nib.scripting
NIB scripting framework.
com.nib.scripting.utils.ftp
FTP client

NIBCAMS1

com.nib.scripting.utils.nibsort

com.nib.supernaut.resources
Resource definition and management for Supernaut.

    Description
    CatalogException
    Base exception class for all catalog-related errors.

    Class
    Description
    CatalogCommand
     
    CatalogEntryNotFoundException
    Exception that indicates a specific catalog entry was not found.
    CatalogException
    Base exception class for all catalog-related errors.
    DuplicatedCatalogEntryException
    Exception indicating that a duplicate entry was found in the catalog.
    ICatalogApi
    Interface for file catalog management operations.
  • Classes in com.nib.commons.io.catalog used by com.nib.commons.io.tools
    Class
    Description
    Catalog
    The Catalog class provides functionality to manage and interact with a catalog, including operations such as file retrieval, storage, definition, deletion, and querying the contents of the catalog.
    CatalogException
    Base exception class for all catalog-related errors.
